steps.title: Use the discriminant condition
steps.content:
A quadratic has no real solution when its discriminant is negative. For $-2x^2+bx-32=0$,
$$a=-2,\quad c=-32$$
So
$$b^2-4ac<0$$
$$b^2-4(-2)(-32)<0$$
$$b^2-256<0$$

steps.title: Find the largest integer
steps.content: The inequality becomes $$b^2<256$$ Since $b$ is a positive integer, the largest value less than $16$ is $15$. The answer is 15.
